issue_title: StarWidget for ratings in comments is not shown anymore
issue_body_preview:
On the company pages, users can leave comments and also, optionally, rate the company they are commenting on. The ratings should be shown as "stars" to the right of the user's name but for some reason, they aren't anymore.

Take [Humble Bundle](https://www.datarequests.org/company/humblebundle) fo
test_description_zh: 访问公司页面（如 /company/humblebundle），查看用户评论列表，观察带有评分的评论条目中用户名旁边的星级评分显示情况。
expected_result_zh: 在带有评分的用户评论中，用户名右侧应正确渲染星形评分组件（StarWidget），以可视化星星图标的形式展示该用户对公司的评分。
